content: How many processes are in the catalog? Answer with the count.

content.content: {"processes": [{"process_id": "PROC-01", "title": "Vendor Onboarding"}, {"process_id": "PROC-02", "title": "Item / SKU Setup"}, {"process_id": "PROC-03", "title": "Replenishment PO"}, {"process_id": "PROC-04", "title": "PO-to-Receipt 3-Way Match"}, {"process_id": "PROC-05", "title": "Invoice Approval / AP"}, {"process_id": "PROC-06", "title": "OS&D Receiving Exception"}, {"process_id": "PROC-07", "title": "Deduction / Chargeback"}, {"process_id": "PROC-08", "title": "Trade-Promo Settlement"}]}
